headline: Reassessing NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether NXP Semiconductors is offering good value at its current price, or if the opportunity has already passed, this article will walk through what the numbers show. The stock recently closed at US$199.87, with returns of a 7.6% decline over 7 days, a 12.7% decline over 30 days, a 9.7% decline year to date, a 0.4% decline over 1 year, 20.4% over 3 years and 4.4% over 5 years. This performance may have influenced how investors are thinking about its potential and...

headline: Here's Why NXP (NXPI) is Poised for a Turnaround After Losing 20.0% in 4 Weeks
summary: The heavy selling pressure might have exhausted for NXP (NXPI) as it is technically in oversold territory now. In addition to this technical measure, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher indicates that the stock is ripe for a trend reversal.

headline: NXP Semiconductors Announces Quarterly Dividend
summary: EINDHOVEN, The Netherlands, March 12, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- As part of its ongoing capital return program, NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ: NXPI) today announced that its board of directors has approved the payment of an interim dividend. The actions are based on the continued and significant strength of the NXP capital structure, and the board’s confidence in the company’s ability to drive long-term growth and strong cash flow.
